def positive_jwt_decode_allows_none_algorithm_or_no_algorithm_restriction():
    rule_id = "jwt_decode_allows_none_algorithm_or_no_algorithm_restriction"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "JWT decoded without restricting the allowed algorithm list, permitting the none algorithm bypass."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
